About Fairly Odd Streamers

Fairly Odd Streamers is a curated resource hub dedicated to helping livestreamers succeed. We believe that content creators deserve access to the best tools, sponsorship opportunities, and insights to build thriving streaming communities.

Our Mission

To empower livestreamers with curated resources, sponsorship opportunities, and actionable insights. We focus on quality over quantity, ensuring every recommendation has been vetted and tested.

What We Offer

  • 100+ verified sponsorship and affiliate opportunities
  • Analytics tools to measure and improve your streams
  • Chat bots and moderation solutions
  • Graphics, overlays, and design resources
  • Free music and sound libraries
  • Professional broadcasting software recommendations
  • Expert interviews with top streamers
  • Actionable guides and tips

Who We Are

Fairly Odd Streamers is a project by streaming enthusiasts who understand the challenges content creators face. We've tested these tools and sponsorships ourselves and are committed to maintaining high standards.

Get In Touch

Have a tool or sponsorship opportunity you'd like us to feature? Found an error? We'd love to hear from you.

Contact Us

About FOS

Fairly Odd Streamers is a resource hub for livestreamers with curated sponsorships, tools, and insights.
